name: Docker Registry Mirror
description: Pull-through cache for Docker Hub. Caches images locally to avoid rate limits. Runs the distribution registry directly as the LXC's PID 1 (no docker daemon, no compose) — when the registry process exits, the LXC stops, so failures are visible in pct list and the deployer UI.

parameters.name: Docker Hub Username
parameters.description: Docker Hub username for authenticated pull-through (200 pulls / 6h instead of 100). Leave empty for anonymous access. The matching password is stored in the dockermr stack.

parameters.name: Environment Variables
parameters.default:
OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER=none
REGISTRY_HTTP_ADDR=0.0.0.0:443
REGISTRY_HTTP_TLS_CERTIFICATE=/etc/ssl/addon/fullchain.pem
REGISTRY_HTTP_TLS_KEY=/etc/ssl/addon/privkey.pem
REGISTRY_PROXY_REMOTEURL=https://registry-1.docker.io
REGISTRY_PROXY_USERNAME={{ DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME }}
REGISTRY_PROXY_PASSWORD={{ DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD }}
REGISTRY_STORAGE_FILESYSTEM_ROOTDIRECTORY=/var/lib/registry
parameters.description: Environment variables passed to the distribution registry (REGISTRY_*). Defaults wire SSL certs from addon-ssl, set the pull-through upstream to Docker Hub, and inject DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME (parameter) and DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD (dockermr stack).

parameters.name: Rootfs Storage
parameters.description: Proxmox storage for the container rootfs

parameters.name: Volume Storage
parameters.description: Proxmox storage ID for data volumes

vars.name: DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD
vars.description: Substituted into REGISTRY_PROXY_PASSWORD via the envs parameter. Changing the stack secret requires re-deploying the mirror so the new value is written to lxc.environment.
